---
name: Bug Report
about: Something isn't working as expected
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened instead. Include any error messages verbatim.

## Platform Affected

- [ ] GitHub results
- [ ] GitLab results
- [ ] Both
- [ ] Not related to search results (e.g., bookmarks, UI, navigation)

## Environment

- **Browser & version:** (e.g., Chrome 120, Firefox 121)
- **Operating System:** (e.g., macOS 14, Windows 11)
- **Live site or local build?**
- **If local:** Node.js version, did you set `GITHUB_TOKEN` in `.env.local`?

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here.
